summary: Comprehensive testing of Model Deployment and What-If Analyzer features. All 19 backend API tests passed. Full end-to-end frontend flow tested successfully: Login -> Load Dataset -> Select Target -> Train Model -> Deploy Model -> What-If Analysis.

issues: Copy URL button shows 'Copy failed' in headless browser (expected - clipboard API limitation)

critical_code_review_comments: Deploy endpoints properly protected with require_auth() decorator
Public endpoints (/api/public/model, /api/public/predict) correctly allow unauthenticated access
Disabled deployments correctly return 403 on public access
Public prediction page correctly renders at /predict/{deploy_id} path via AppWrapper
What-If Analyzer correctly uses prepareInputForPrediction and model.modelData
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Client-side ML prediction works correctly in browser

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Deploy and What-If features verified working

seed_data_creation: Created new deployment 'Logistic Regression — Approved' (ID: c55a0c91-c48) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deploy and What-If features fully tested and working. Key flows: 1) Login -> Analysis -> Load Sample Dataset -> Select Target -> Train -> Deploy tab shows models to deploy -> Click Deploy -> Get public URL. 2) What-If requires trained model in context - after training, navigate to What-If tab -> Click 'Start Analyzing' -> Baseline/Modified panels appear -> Click 'Compare Predictions' -> Results show. Public prediction page at /predict/{deploy_id} works without auth. Key data-testids: nav-deploy, nav-whatif, deploy-view, whatif-view, whatif-init-btn, whatif-run-btn, whatif-results, deployment-*, toggle-deploy-*, copy-url-*, deploy-btn-*, public-predict-page, public-predict-btn, prediction-result, prediction-value.
